note: Surface-completeness triage for wstETH (non-proxy). ERC20+EIP-2612 standard funcs are exclude — covered by the erc20 standard adapter via tokens:erc20 auto-enumerate. Lido-specific surface = wrap (stETH->wstETH) / unwrap (wstETH->stETH).

0xea598cb0.name: wrap
0xea598cb0.reason: LIQUID-STAKING wrap — converts stETH to non-rebasing wstETH (locks shares); user fund-move. New liquid_staking domain (Tier 3).

0xde0e9a3e.name: unwrap
0xde0e9a3e.reason: LIQUID-STAKING unwrap — converts wstETH back to stETH; user fund-move.

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC20 approve — erc20 standard adapter (tokens:erc20 auto-enumerate).

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC20 transfer — erc20 standard adapter.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC20 transferFrom — erc20 standard adapter.

0xd505accf.name: permit
0xd505accf.reason: EIP-2612 permit — standard ERC-2612 off-chain allowance, handled by the erc20 standard path.

0x39509351.name: increaseAllowance
0x39509351.reason: OZ ERC20 allowance helper — erc20 standard adapter.

0xa457c2d7.name: decreaseAllowance
0xa457c2d7.reason: OZ ERC20 allowance helper — erc20 standard adapter.
